message:
feat(codegen): Migrate logical.zig to builder pattern

Migrated genBoolOp to use the structured builder pattern:
- Uses builder.write() instead of raw emit() for output
- Uses self.emitZigValue() for ZigValue emission
- Proper flushBuilder() calls before exprEmitter usage
- Removed helper functions (emitToBool, emitRuntimePyBoolOp)

This continues Phase 4 builder migration by converting logical
operators (and, or) to the unified builder architecture.
